inputs.text: Maine kal raat se bahut tezi se bukhaar ho raha hai, sir bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, Dengue typically presents with additional symptoms

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhaar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Joint pain is more typical in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever less likely given the specific nature of the pain

inputs.text: Bukhaar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of rash, dropping fever, and bleeding gums is highly suggestive of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: The specific combination of symptoms is less typical for viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria does not typically present with rash or bleeding gums

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut kamzor hoon, pet dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The progression to severe weakness and abdominal symptoms is consistent with Dengue hemorrhagic fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific symptoms and progression

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of typical Malaria symptoms
